title: The Noland Legend Returns
description: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Bellamy, Masira, Shojo, Luffy. The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.text: Now this is the crucial part.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
